title: bouchea pseudogervao
intro: Bouchea pseudogervao, also known as 'False Gervoa' or 'Pseudogervao', is a plant species belonging to the Verbenaceae family, native to Southeast Asia. Its leaves and stems have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to their purported anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's leaves are also believed to possess health benefits such as reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting wound healing. In traditional herbal preparations, Bouchea pseudogervao is often used in teas, infusions, or as a topical application, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
